group.name: AWIPS Development
group.description: This Will Install All Of The AWIPS Components That Are Required For Deploying in Eclipse (non DB)

group.name: AWIPS EDEX Server
group.description: This Will Install All Of The AWIPS II Components That Are Required For A Standalone / ADAM Environment.

group.name: AWIPS EDEX Decode/Ingest (No Database, PyPIES, GFE)
group.description: This Will Install the AWIPS Components That Are Required For ingesting and decoding data (used with ancillary machine installs)

group.name: AWIPS CAVE
group.description: This Will Install The AWIPS II Visualization Environment Including: CAVE

group.name: AWIPS II Visualize NCEP
group.description: This Will Install The AWIPS II Visualization NCEP Environment Including: CAVE, AlertViz, ...

group.name: AWIPS II Processing Server
group.description: This Will Install The AWIPS II Processing Server Including: Edex, ...

group.name: AWIPS II Database Server
group.description: This Will Install The AWIPS II Database Server And Create The Required AWIPS II Database Tables.

group.name: AWIPS II Pypies Server
group.description: This Will Install The AWIPS II Pypies Server.

group.name: AWIPS II Message Broker Server
group.description: This Will Install The AWIPS II Message Broker Server.

group.name: AWIPS II LDM Server
group.description: This Will Install The AWIPS II LDM Server.

group.name: AWIPS II Rehost Server
group.description: This Will Install The AWIPS II Rehost Server.

group.name: AWIPS II DPA Server
group.description: This Will Install The AWIPS II Data Processing Agent Server Including: Edex, ...

group.name: AWIPS II Registry Server
group.description: This Will Install The AWIPS II Registry Server Including: Edex, ...

group.name: AWIPS II Central Registry Server
group.description: This Will Install The AWIPS II Central Registry Server Including: Edex, ...

group.name: AWIPS II SJU Processing Server
group.description: This Will Install The AWIPS II SJU Processing Server Including: Edex, ...

group.name: AWIPS II BMH
group.description: This Will Install The AWIPS II BMH Software

group.name: AWIPS II LOCAL FOSS
group.description: This Will Install The AWIPS II FOSS RPMs

group.name: AWIPS II RFC Archive Server
group.description: This Will Install AWIPS II Software Necessary for the RFC AX

group.name: AWIPS II NCEP Plug-Ins
group.description: This Will Install EDEX Plug-ins Specific to NCEP.

group.name: AWIPS II Cache Server
group.description: This Will Install The AWIPS II Cache Server

group.name: AWIPS II CHPS Database
group.description: This Will Install CHPS Database rpms.

group.name: AWIPS II CHPS FSS support software
group.description: This Will Install software to support the CHPS FSS application.
